overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long BMNR Daily ETF (BMNG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Bitmine Immersion Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BMNR) stock, less fees, and expenses BMNG was launched on Oct 27, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
